title: T-054 — UI: TEC-088 Maintenance Cross-Link Panel
prompt: Build maintenance cross-link panel embedded in item/routing detail per §12A. Read-only summary linking to 13-MAINTENANCE asset health. Match `maintenance_screen` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:266-311. RED tests/ui/tec-088-maintenance.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-088-maintenance.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Read-only cross-link panel surfacing maintenance status from 13-MAINTENANCE.
pipeline_inputs.details: Reads via 13-MAINTENANCE GET endpoint (assumed present). Renders status badges + link to /maintenance/[asset_id].
acceptance_criteria: Given the panel renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:266-311, then card layout, status badges, and link styling match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
Given asset has no maintenance data, when rendered, then empty card with 'No maintenance data' copy appears.
Given clicking a row, when fired, then router navigates to /maintenance/[asset_id].
risk_red_lines: Do not allow writes from this panel.
